hooks.command: powershell -Command "$branch = git branch --show-current; if ($branch -eq 'main') { Write-Error 'Direct commits to main are not allowed. Use feature/<name> or claude/<name> branch.'; exit 1 }"
powershell -Command "$input = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($input.file_path -match 'script\.js$') { Write-Host '[Reminder] script.js を変更しました。ブラウザで複利計算・グラフを確認してください。' }"
